priority_lock.description: Defines RCA-X execution hierarchy (e.g., KILL_SWITCH > COMPLIANCE)

issuer.description: Authority that signed the payload (e.g., Structural Design Labs (SDL LIMITED))

signature.description: Cryptographic signature of the payload (e.g., sha256:abc123...)

public_key.description: The PEM-encoded public key used for verification

payload.description: The actual RCA-X ignition string (max 1000 tokens)

checksum.description: Integrity checksum of the payload (e.g., md5:xyz789...)
